description: Importable org structure for agent orchestration frameworks (Paperclip, Claude Code sub-agents, Codex, OpenClaw, Hermes, Gemini CLI). Start with these 8 roles; split further only when a clear bottleneck appears.

roles.title: CEO
roles.responsibility: Hires, fires, sets priorities, reads daily reports, signs paper->live promotions.

roles.title: CTO / Research Engineer
roles.responsibility: Picks backtest library, data sources, infrastructure. Owns data pipeline reproducibility.

roles.title: Strategy Researcher
roles.responsibility: Reads papers, transcripts, forums. Proposes strategies. Files specs.

roles.title: Backtest Engineer
roles.responsibility: Implements strategies. Enforces backtest hygiene. Produces reproducible metrics.

roles.title: Red Team
roles.responsibility: Breaks every strategy before risk signs off. Follows the 14-item playbook.
instruction_must_include: be mean; find reasons to reject

roles.title: Risk Officer
roles.responsibility: Owns hard constraints. Signs off paper->live. Triggers circuit breakers.

roles.title: Execution Engineer
roles.responsibility: Order routing, slippage tracking, fail-safes, venue adapters.

roles.title: Accountant
roles.responsibility: Immutable daily P&L, tax lots, exportable ledger, weekly reconciliation.

routines.output: strategies advanced to backtested with metrics
weekly review note + any retirement decisions
